description_long: This bird features a slender, elongated body with a long, pointed beak and a dramatic crest of feathers atop its head. Its wings are long and narrow, extending outward with visible feather details, and its tail is deeply forked, giving it a striking silhouette. The plumage is primarily a mix of reddish-brown and dark brown tones, with subtle gradients and mottling across the body and wings. The legs are thin and dark, ending in sharp, splayed talons. The head is small relative to the body, with a pronounced, needle-like beak and expressive feather tufts. The overall appearance is reminiscent of a heron or crane, but with exaggerated, stylized features.
description: A slender, reddish-brown bird with a long, pointed beak, dramatic feather crest, and deeply forked tail. Its wings are long and narrow, and its legs are thin and dark.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bird's elongated body, pointed beak, and prominent feather crest, with the forked tail and splayed talons visible.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the narrow body, symmetrical outstretched wings, and the sharp, forward-facing beak.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same elongated features, with the forked tail and feather crest visible from a different angle.
description_view_3: Rear view emphasizing the deeply forked tail, symmetrical wings, and the back of the head and body.
attribute_plumage_pattern: Mottled and gradient with subtle color transitions across body and wings, and a prominent feather crest on the head.
